appBar.errorOccurred: An error has occurred, please <refreshAction>refresh the session</refreshAction>. If the problem still exists, click close session.

session.containsDatabaseWarning: This session contains data stored in the database, export and reload the database to resume the session later.
session.resetSessionWarning: All unexported content (charts, derived data, concepts) will be lost upon reset.
session.resetWarning: All unsaved content (data, charts, reports) will be lost. Make sure to save your session before resetting.
session.installLocallyHint: Install locally to use this feature

config.chartSizeRangeError: Value must be between 100 and 1000 pixels
config.autoChartInsightHint: Automatically generate AI insights when a new chart is created.
config.formulateTimeoutRangeError: Value must be between 1 and 3600 seconds
config.formulateTimeoutHint: Maximum time allowed for the formulation process before timing out.
config.maxRepairAttemptsHint: How many attempts LLM will make to repair code if code fails to execute (recommended = 1, higher values might increase the chance of success but it's slow).
config.localRowLimitRangeError: Value must be between 100 and 1,000,000 rows
config.localRowLimitHint: Maximum number of rows kept when loading data locally (not stored on server).
config.maxStretchFactorHint: How much charts can grow beyond the base size (1.0 = no stretch, 2.0 = up to 2×).

landing.tagline: Explore data with visualizations, powered by AI agents.
landing.modelTip: Models with strong code generation capabilities (e.g., gpt-5, claude-sonnet-4-5) provide best experience with Data Formulator.

about.feature1Description: Load structured data, connect to databases. Ask AI agents to extract and clean (small) ad-hoc data from screenshots, text blocks.
about.feature2Description: Vibe with your data. Hands-off and let agents automatically explore and visualize data from high-level goals.
about.feature3Description: Use UI interactions and natural language to precisely describe chart designs. Ask AI agents for recommendations. Use Data Threads to backtrack, explore new branches, or follow up.
about.feature4Description: Interact with charts, inspect data, formulas, and code. Create reports to share insights grounded in your exploration.
about.dataHandlingText: Data stored in browser only • Local install runs Python locally; online demo processes server-side (not stored) • LLM receives small samples with prompts
about.installViaPipAria: Install Locally via pip (opens in new tab)
about.watchVideoAria: Watch Video on YouTube (opens in new tab)
about.viewGithubAria: View on GitHub (opens in new tab)

footer.termsOfUseAria: Terms of Use (opens in new tab)

agentRules.title: Agent Rules
agentRules.codingRulesHint: (Rules that guide AI agents when generating code to transform data and recommend visualizations.)
agentRules.explorationRulesHint: (Rules that guide AI agents when exploring datasets, generating questions, and discovering insights)

refresh.description: Upload new data to replace the current table content. Required columns:
refresh.installLocallyForUpload: Install Data Formulator locally to enable file upload.
refresh.urlPlaceholder: Load a CSV, TSV, or JSON file from a URL, e.g. https://example.com/data.json
refresh.urlSuffixHelper: URL should link to a .csv, .tsv, or .json file
refresh.errorNoData: No data found in the uploaded content.
refresh.errorColumnCountMismatch: Column count mismatch. Expected {{expected}} columns ({{expectedNames}}), but got {{actual}} columns ({{actualNames}}).
refresh.errorJsonArray: JSON content must be an array of objects.
refresh.errorParsePaste: Could not parse the pasted content as JSON or CSV/TSV.
refresh.errorParseContent: Failed to parse the pasted content.
refresh.errorUrlSuffix: URL must point to a .csv, .tsv, or .json file.
refresh.errorParseUrl: Could not parse the URL content as JSON or CSV/TSV.
refresh.errorParseFile: Could not parse the file content.
refresh.errorUnsupportedFormat: Unsupported file format. Please use CSV, TSV, JSON, or Excel files.
refresh.errorFileTooLarge: File is too large ({{size}}MB). Maximum size is 5MB.
refresh.errorFetchUrl: Failed to fetch data from URL: {{message}}

report.couldNotFindContent: Could not find report content to capture
report.imageCopied: Report image copied to clipboard! You can now paste it anywhere to share.
report.failedToCopyClipboard: Failed to copy to clipboard. Your browser may not support this feature.
report.clipboardNotSupported: Clipboard API not supported in your browser. Please use a modern browser.
report.failedToGenerateReportImage: Failed to generate report image. Please try again.
report.pleaseSelectChart: Please select at least one chart
report.truncationNote: Note: Some tables were truncated to {{maxRows}} rows for this report. Tables affected: {{list}}.
report.noChartsAvailable: No charts available. Create some visualizations first.
report.noAvailableCharts: No available charts to display. Charts may still be loading or unavailable.
report.aiDisclaimer: AI generated the post from the selected charts, and it could be inaccurate!
